questions.label: water_balance_conservation
doc_errors_latent: cross_module/water_balance_conservation.md:55 says irrigation efficiency '66% default'; code: 66% (s42_irrigation_efficiency=0.66, input.gms:19) applies ONLY under non-default s42_irrig_eff_scenario=1. deferred: x_ prefix (§6 line 244, 'Critical output parameters'): no live variable in develop uses x_/x##_/xm_ (rg: x[0-9][0-9]_ = 0 unique, xm_ = 0; positive control o[0-9][0-9]_ = 8). All §4-§8 numerical examples are explicitly labeled illustrative/made-up; not code-checkable and correctly caveated.
doc_centric_audit.summary: Verdict: Mostly Accurate (lower band). 3 Major + 1 Minor, all reproducible. Major cluster: §7.5 vm_carbon_stock populator set (M30 mis-attributed as direct provider vs M29 aggregator [R24/MANDATE17]; M29+M34 omitted [R20/MANDATE13]) and §7.2/§2.3 soil-carbon assembly attributed to M52 when M59 q59_carbon_soil writes the soilc slice. Equations, set citations, all realization+scalar defaults, and the G2 vm_carbon_stock declaration verify clean.

doc_centric_audit.label: water_balance_conservation
deferred: magpie4 R functions in Sections 8-10 (water_demand(), water_avail(), readGDX args) -- downstream R layer, not verifiable against GAMS worktree
'cell' vs 'cluster' terminology -- standard MAgPIE shorthand; ~200 cells matches 200-cluster default; not a code error

Section 6.4 'no feedback from M43 to M41 investment' / 'stranded AEI' -- modeling-judgment claim, vm_AEI and area<=AEI constraint (41/.../equations.gms:11) are real; no-feedback assertion not falsifiable by single grep, plausible
Section 7.3 LPJmL regional runoff patterns -- explicitly labeled literature/illustrative
All '(illustrative)' numbered examples (5.1,7.1,7.2,7.5,8.x) -- explicitly labeled made-up
doc_centric_audit.summary: 38 load-bearing claims verified; doc is mostly accurate. 3 confirmed bugs: WB-1 Major (Sec 2.1 '66% default' irrigation efficiency wrong -- default is GDP-sigmoid scenario 2, 0.66 only under non-default scenario 1); WB-2 Major (Sec 5.3 citation realization.gms:40-42 attributes uncoded economic/political justifications to buffer-interface lines); WB-3 Minor (EFP_countries default=249 ISO, not '195'). No fabricated vars/eqs/realizations; cross-module consumer sets for vm_watdem/im_wat_avail/v43_watavail all correct and complete.

doc_centric_audit.label: nitrogen_food_balance
deferred: Numerical magnitude ranges in input/output tables (e.g. '50-250 kg N/ha/yr', '10-40% of N surplus', 'income elasticity 0.3-0.8', '1-3% of N applied') - illustrative, not single code constants; not checkable against a scalar default.
'f21_trade_balanceflow ... near zero outside base period' - quantitative claim about input-data values (.cs3); not checkable from .gms.
Doc lines 196-199 (calories/protein/fat in M15; balance in DM) - directionally consistent, not deeply verified this round (outside M50/51/59/16/17/21 scope).

q51_emissions_* glob (doc lines 59,68): two of seven emission eqs are named q51_emissionbal_awms / q51_emissionbal_man_past; M51 substantively computes all pathways, so harmless wildcard shorthand - NOT flagged.

Part 2.4 'Regional Balance (Module 21, q21_trade_reg)': q21_trade_reg is the self-sufficiency production-band lower bound, not a supply=demand balance (non-tradable balance is q21_notrade). Equation name is correct and prose accurate at high level; characterization loose but not clearly wrong - noted, not flagged.
doc_centric_audit.summary: 5 bugs: 1 Major (M13 falsely credited with N-responsive yields; M13 has zero N refs, models tau) + 4 Minor (cite :18-30 should be :14-16 balance; nonexistent soil-N pool asserted; M16 'calculates' vs aggregates food demand; Food Balance mislabeled 'Equality' vs code =g=). No Critical. q21_trade_glo verbatim + vm_import/export non-existence correctly stated.

doc_centric_audit.label: circular_dependency_resolution
deferred: Executive Summary '26 circular dependency cycles' count + sec 8.1 source cite to Module_Dependencies.md:149-179 -- cycle count is an analytical artifact (depends on enumeration method), not grep-falsifiable; sec 8.2 is self-labeled 'Inferred/Suspected'.

Sec 3.2 Cycle-2 diagram tag 'pm_land_conservation [22] -> vm_land.lo(j,land_natveg) [10]': parameter + 'protect' member correct, bounds ARE set on M10's vm_land.lo but the read/bound-setting is in M35 (pot_forest_may24/presolve.gms:162,201,231) and M29, not M10. Tagging the bounded variable '[10]' (its home module) is defensible shorthand; not flagged (MANDATE-17 borderline, does not mislead modification safety since the variable genuinely belongs to M10).

Sec 6.1 risk-table parentheticals ('Module 10: 4+ cycles, 15 consumers'; 'Module 54: 0 cycles, 1 connection') -- 'consumer' undefined; vm_land has 10+ consumers (order-of-magnitude plausible) but not falsifiable to a precise integer.
Sec 7.3 parallelization claims (modules 37/45/54 independent; water 41-42-43 isolatable) -- architectural assertions, not single-line code facts.
Sec 2.4 'Yields<->TC<->Livestock require multiple model runs to converge' -- documented multi-run tau calibration; M14 managementcalib_aug19/preloop.gms exists; not falsifiable at this granularity.

Illustrative '* Example:'-labeled code in sec 6.2/7.2/9 (vm_cost_landcon, damping postsolve, tau adjustment) -- pedagogical modification patterns (MANDATE 5 permits), not code-evidence claims; not audited.
doc_centric_audit.summary: 30 claims verified; realizations/defaults/q10_land_area exact. 4 bugs: 3 Major (sec2.2 trade describes non-default bilateral realization + fabricates q21_trade_bilat; sec2.1 pcm_carbon_stock update wrongly attributed to M52 not M56 w/ wrong dims; sec2.1 invents pcm_carbon_density, real is pm_carbon_density), 1 Minor (pm_interest miscategorized in pcm_* table). Bugs 2-3 contradict the doc's own Appendix A.

doc_centric_audit.label: modification_safety_guide
deferred: Appendix A graph metrics (lines 1055-1068: Connections / Provides To / Depends On) are sourced to Module_Dependencies.md:29-40 under that doc's own counting convention; code gives 10_land 'Provides To'=18 distinct consumers vs table's 15, but the metric's inclusion rules cannot be reconstructed from GAMS alone. M11 'Depends On: 27' WAS independently confirmed. Defer rest to a Module_Dependencies.md-vs-code audit.

Internal doc-to-doc line citations not checkable against GAMS: module_11.md:84-115 (line 229), Module_Dependencies.md:151-179 (line 606), :29-40 (line 1068), section 2.1 lines 46-59 (line 1087), nitrogen_food_balance.md:229-250 (line 424), carbon_balance_conservation.md:450-550 (line 504).
section 1.2 historical narrative 'pcm_land 5->12; others OVERSTATED' (line 52) is metadata about a past recompute; current counts all verified correct, deltas not load-bearing.

section 4.4 flow-diagram arrow 'CDR Rewards -> 32_forestry' (line 493): vm_reward_cdr_aff is consumed only by 11_costs, but the arrow is framed as an economic/emergent linkage (reward enters objective via 11, optimizer then expands forestry), not a hard '32 consumes vm_reward_cdr_aff' interface claim. Not flagged.
c56_pollutant_prices shorthand 'SSP2-NPi2025' vs full R34M410-SSP2-NPi2025, and im_pollutant_prices(t,...) vs declared (t_all,...): acceptable abbreviations, not bugs.
doc_centric_audit.summary: 6 bugs: 1 Critical (im_pollutant_prices consumers listed as 32/60; actual sole consumer is 57_maccs - R20 anchor), 2 Major citation drifts (pm_prod_init cited to 70_livestock not 17_production:10; s56_c_price_induced_aff cited to input.gms:103 not :69), 3 Minor (15-vs-11 module count; footnote omits 2 union-driving vars; vm_emission_costs omits 15_food). Core consumer sets, 9 cost attributions, M56 defaults, equations all verified correct vs develop @ ee98739fd.

doc_centric_audit.label: module_10
deferred: LUH2 category mapping (module_10.md:229-235, c3ann+c4ann->crop etc.) is preprocessing (mrcommons/mrland), not in M10 GAMS; doc cites no GAMS file for it.
secdforest >20 tC/ha and other <20 tC/ha thresholds (module_10.md:159,161) are preprocessing-derived land classifications, not in M10 GAMS.
'67,420 original 0.5 deg cells' (module_10.md:413) is a global LUH/preprocessing grid figure, not verifiable from the develop GAMS tree; doc hedges it.
LUH2 source provenance and '249 ISO countries' (module_10.md:223,265) are input-data facts, not GAMS-checkable here.
'Last Verified 2026-03-06 ... Changes Since Last Verification: None (stable)' footer is metadata; equations/variables are in fact stable, so not flagged as a content bug.
doc_centric_audit.summary: module_10.md core (7 eqs, vars, params, citations, land set) is verbatim-accurate. Both advisory-flagged R29 fixes HELD (vm_land 10-consumer list at :316; expansion/reduction note at :344 - survived the _forestry look-alike trap). 8 bugs: 5 Major (self-contradicting '11 modules' for vm_land vs the doc's own 10; PROVIDES-TO table mislabels 80/14/71 as vm_land when they read vm_landdiff/pm_land_start; 13/44/56 called 'indirect' but directly read pcm_land, which is omitted from the interface table) + 3 Minor (h200 vs c200; Secondary<->Other one-directional; 318 vs 292 lines).

deferred: module_10.md:306 -- vm_land in PROVIDES-TO for module 14 (no vm_land refs in code)
module_10.md:312 -- vm_land in PROVIDES-TO for module 71 (no vm_land refs in code)
module_10.md:313 -- vm_land for module 80 (should be vm_landdiff per code)

module_09.md:864 / :208 gloss on M13 TC mechanism ('GDP affects adoption rates' vs. spending-cap via s13_max_gdp_shr) -- the audit entry flags it as a doc_error but the provided evidence is a file:line read without a quoted replacement string, and the entry notes it is Minor and directionally OK. Deferred pending a concrete replacement sentence to avoid introducing a different inaccuracy.

carbon_balance_conservation.md:943 ('Modules 52 and 59 must interface correctly (topsoil + subsoil)') — this developer note is accurate at a high level (they do interface, with M59 writing soilc using M52 density), so no edit is warranted. The latent-bug 'reinforced :939' reference points to a blank line in the actual file; the nearby prose is not wrong.
Latent doc error entry for line 55 (irrigation efficiency 66% default) is identical to confirmed bug #1 and was resolved by the same edit -- no separate action needed.

Latent: module_21.md:70 k_trade '38 items' should be '33 items' - confirmed bug with code evidence (modules/21_trade/selfsuff_reduced/sets.gms:17-21) but target doc is module_21.md, not nitrogen_food_balance.md; not in scope for this task.
Latent: module_50.md:437,751 '8 nitrogen input sources' vs 9 terms in q50_nr_inputs - in module_50.md, not in scope for this task.
